feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Programmatically Change/Update the Local SAP GUI Options
entry.content:
To all the Guru's,

When trying to set-up new users in SAP, there are things that can be done with Scripting and things that I have yet to figure out how to do.  I'm not ABAP programmer, I can barely create a script to update / data using Excel.  But using Power Points and scripting does nothing to ease the user into setting up their profile within SAP,  As a matter of course, I see that most users fail miserably in getting the User Profile set-up properly and so they struggle with using SAP.

\Having said all that, my question to all is this;

Is there a a way to programmatically change the SAP GUI Options?

I would like to send a user an email with a link or a file that would make all of the changes in their profile for them and to also change things in the SAP GUI Options (Customize Local Layout).

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: SAP MDG: Composite UIBB - List to List Possible ?
entry.content:
Hi SCN People, 

While i was trying to create wiring - Port Type not accepting 

 

Thank You, 

Suggu Sandeep.

entry.title: RAP CDS annotation based custom action triggering automatic navigation to object page S/4HANA 2023
entry.content:
Hi Experts,
When I Click on CDS annotation based custom action  "clean" defined in table header triggering automatic navigation to object page. Action implemented using  bopf .

@ui.lineItem:[{ type: #FOR_ACTION, position: 1, dataAction: 'BOPF:CLEAN', label: 'Clean'}]

I have checked CDS annotation, there is no semanicaction and semanicobject annotation defined on this action  and checked bopf class and manifest as well did not find any root cause of this automatic navigation issue.
This is custom app
SAP S/4HANA 2023

entry.title: Embedding S4 Custom Fiori app inside BTP Fiori app
entry.content:
Hello SAP Team,
I would like to embed/load S/4HANA Custom Fiori App inside BTP hosted freestyle Fiori App in a container or iframe. I was investigating if this is doable, flow is that user wants to load the S/4HANA deployed Fiori app from the Custom SAPUI5 app deployed in BTP based on some criteria with some parameter on click of a button on next screen which will be detail screen wrapping up the embedded Fiori app from S/4HANA by passing the required URL parameter, is there any way this can be achieved through standard services on BTP or is it doable?

Any point of view or suggestions are most welcome.

Thanks, Siddharth

SAP Business Technology Platform SAPUI5 SAP Build Work Zone, advanced edition

entry.title: Using Fiori 8D problem solving for defect created in S/4 Hana using SAP QM
entry.content:
Hello
I've just completed a migration from ECC to S/4 Hana. My QM manager need to manage a 8D report on Defects created in S/4 Hana with QM01 tarnsaction or similar. I know which Porblem solving 8D metodology is available only in FIORI using APP F2929. I can manage 8D procedure only for defects created directly in FIORI using Create defect Tile, but I'm not able to Process defects previously created on S/4 QM environment (QM01 or similar). Someone can suggest to me a solution ? Is it possible manage  8D Metodolgy in Fiori for defects created in S/4 QM too ?
Thank-you in advance for your help
Claudio

entry.title: The CDS View has Billed Date in DATS Format in S/4 HANA. This reflects as STRING in Datasphere
entry.content: I consume a CDS View from my S/4 HANA Connection as a Remote Table in Datasphere. The Column Billed Date represented as DATS Data Type in S/4 HANA, is incoming to Datasphere in my CDS View Remote Table as STRING. What should I do to get the Data Type as Date in my CDS View Remote Table in Datasphere.

entry.title: liberation strategy connection
entry.content:
Hello everyone.
I have the following question:
in my company we want to implement the approval and request of orders through the “my inbox” application of fiori.
currently we have an approval strategy implemented in sap gui, then the question is: if we implement the my inbox application, could an approval strategy using sap gui be used together with the my inbox application of fiori?
i.e. if the purchase order has to go through 3 approvers, could 2 approvers use sap gui and 1 approver use my inbox?
I have not found any official sap information on this and it would help me to have it, also obviously if you answer me to this question.
Thank you very much and if you have any doubt please reply me to clarify my question,

entry.title: SAP Inventory report
entry.content: Hi, I would like to know if SAP can have a report showing the Stock Qty, Total Receipts and Open PO quantities per part number

entry.title: S/4HANA TM & EWM Embedded - Configuration Guide
entry.content:
We are implementing S/4 HANA 2023 FPS 01 version where we have SAP Transportation Management and SAP Extended Warehouse Management modules are embedded. Please share configuration URL so that we can start configuration for both modules.

entry.title: How to use Standard API from BAS
entry.content:
I would like to use Standard API from BAS script.

for example i want to retrieve Material Documents data from s4hana cloud system and use in BAS.

Then, can I use Material Documents API in BAS? How can I try to use API?

Best Regards,

KhaingZin

entry.title: What is the process of Back ground job in HANA Public cloud and How we can schedule
entry.content:
Hello All

Hope your are doing well !

We have received a requirement from the client. They need to schedule background jobs on the cloud server, similar to how they do in the on-premises system. Could you please let us know if we can schedule jobs for both standard and custom programs, and ensure the job runs every day?

Thank you 

JP

entry.title: Customer Consignment Process
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We are using SAP with Extended Warehouse System and when I was trying to create a Customer Consignment process, I was not able to see the warehouse task created under Run Outbound Process - Deliveries app in SAP S/4 HANA Fiori.

Wondering, is there any configuration needs to be done for customer consignment with EWM? EWM supports all consignment fill up, issue, return and pickup process?

Please throw some lights on the above.

Thanks! SAP S/4HANA SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Sales EWM - Warehouse Order Processing SD (Sales and Distribution) EWM - Delivery Processing EWM - Shipping and Receiving

entry.title: Fetching wrong exchange rate from tcurr in fm CONVERT_TO_LOCAL_CURRENCY
entry.content:
Hi all,

I am using FM CONVERT_TO_LOCAL_CURRENCY to convert currency from EUR to GBP. 

CALL FUNCTION 'CONVERT_TO_LOCAL_CURRENCY'
EXPORTING
client = sy-mandt
date = sy-datum
foreign_amount = lv_f_amount
foreign_currency = lv_fcurr
local_currency = iv_waers
rate = 0
type_of_rate = 'P'
read_tcurr = 'X'
IMPORTING
local_amount = lv_locamt
exchange_rate = lv_exchange_rate
EXCEPTIONS
no_rate_found = 1
overflow = 2
OTHERS = 3.

It is converting value but the exchange rate it takes is wrong. In table tcurr we have maintained this rate

but the rate it is taking is the one highlighed

this is the data I am giving directly into the fm

293725.89

The result of fm and my code is same. There is no alternative currency maintained in tcurf. 

 

Please suggest what I should do.

entry.title: Changing settlement receiver
entry.content:
Hello,

we have this issue-work order was created with WBS element "A". After that WBS element was changed to WBS"B". Now when you open WO ->Settlement rule first time in column Settlement receiver is WBS"A", go out and back to settlement rule and in column settlement receiver is WBS"B".  

first attempt second attempt

entry.title: Unrestricted stock in storage locations for maintenance orders using fiori apps
entry.content:
Hello Experts!

We are implementing the corrective maintenance process (BH1) in S/4HANA Cloud, Private Edition, and are aiming to manage everything through Fiori apps. During testing, we encountered an issue: when a maintenance order consumes a material that is out of stock in any storage location, the system allows the process to proceed without showing any error or message in the Fiori app (Create/Change Maintenance Order).

For example, when performing the same process in the SAP GUI transaction (IW31/IW32), the system displays the unrestricted-use stock as a field in the storage location search help, as shown below:

However, when we open the storage location search help in the Fiori app, the stock information is not available:

We would like to know if there is a similar functionality that allows us to view unrestricted-use stock in specific storage locations, similar to the SAP GUI, or if there is an option to activate a warning message. Alternatively, is it possible to extend the search help functionality in the Fiori app to add the stock fields using ABAP code ?

 

Thank you in advance for your help and best regards!

entry.title: MD01N lot sıze problem
entry.content:
Hello,

When we run MRP through MD01N in SAP S/4HANA, it does not always create the correct plan based on the lot size data in the MM module. Upon reviewing the MRP results, we notice that it treats weekends and public holidays as working days and generates planned orders accordingly. For example, for a material with a lot size of 3 days, when MRP runs on a Friday, we expect it to gather the needs for Friday, Saturday, and Monday and create a planned order. However, currently, it collects the needs for Friday, Saturday, and Sunday, leading to a planned order quantity based on 2 working days since Sunday is not a working day. As the frequency of the lot size decreases, it creates multiple planned orders for the same material on the same day. Is there a solution to this issue? Can you provide support? Thank you.

entry.title: The Header Material item category is not changing to T (Text) after BOM explode
entry.content: While Exploding WBS Bom, the Header material item category not getting chnaged to T (T) after having the same BOM material below.

entry.title: Identify table and field for rejection comment in lean service entry sheet process
entry.content:
Hi Team

For lean service entry sheet approval process users receive notification in the app inbox with two option

accept or reject

Upon rejection pop up appears for user to provide comments and the status to provide comments and the status of the lean service entry sheet updated to rejected with the comment entered at the time of rejection.

Please help identify table and field where the rejection comment stored so we can fetch information for reporting


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Contract with completion rule does not allow more than one release sales order
entry.content:
Hello SD Masters,

I faced I scenario by which customer needs to have a balance control between volume contract and referenced sales orders.

In resume:

Contract was created with 12 tons. Customer asked us to make possible to have the split of these quantity in 3 sales orders of 4 tons.

The item category of contract is assigned completion rule = "C- Item is completed after the target qty is fully referenced".

Copy control is settled with "+", in field Pos./Neg. Quan.

After creation of 1st. sales order with 4 tons. there is a message error at the momento of creation of 2nd. sales order:

"The reference has already been completely copied or rejected

Message no. V2015

Diagnosis

The reference document cannot be further referenced because all items have either been referenced or rejected"

I had an idea that the system would have a balance control, between contract and sales order. That is, this message would be shown only after I consumed the 12 tons. from the contract.

Is this a standard behavior from S/4, or something can be wrong, for here?

Best regards, and thanks!!!

entry.title: SAP MDG: Steps to Configure Document Types ?
entry.content:
Hi all,

I am trying to add the documents in the UIBB  ERP Documents while creating a business partner. I have two issues here.

One is that I can see only two document types if I try to add a document.
Second one is even if I select anyone out of it, it goes into the dump.

Can someone please help me out with the detailed process of configuring document types, add documents and make them flow to SAP.

Thanks, 
Suggu Sandeep.
